pageProps.data:
CustomPaint

该组件在页面创建了一个 Canvas ，并通过 painter 命名参数指定具体的作画流程。

CustomPaint(size: Size(1400, 2400),painter: FirstCustomPainter(),), class FirstCustomPainter extends CustomPainter {@overridevoid paint(canvas, size) {// ignore: unused_local_variablevar center = Offset(size.width / 3, size.height / 3);var paint = Paint()..color = Colors.red..style = PaintingStyle.stroke..strokeWidth = 2;canvas.drawCircle(center, size.height / 4, paint);}@overridebool shouldRepaint(covariant CustomPainter oldDelegate) {// throw UnimplementedError();return true;}}

CustomPaint 的几个参数：
pageProps.title: CustomPaint
